# TiledStyleBinding.TiledStyleSnoId property

The SNO id the widget's `snoTiledStyle` field is bound to. Pass to [`ReadTiledStyle`](../Diablo4Storage/ReadTiledStyle.md) to read the full record; [`Style`](./Style.md) is the pre-read convenience.

```csharp
public int TiledStyleSnoId { get; set; }
```
